title: Schema corruption after aborted CREATE TABLE AS
poc:
CREATE TABLE AS statement is part of a larger transaction and it aborts
due to an error condition in the SELECT on the right-hand side, this can leave
the sqlite3_master table with a blank entry which subsequent database
connections will interpret as a corrupt database.  The following SQL
illustrates the problem:
BEGIN;
CREATE TABLE t1 AS SELECT zeroblob(2e20);
key_bug_features: CREATE TABLE AS aborts in larger transaction
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table);
CREATE TABLE faulty_table AS SELECT zeroblob(1e20);
